chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 3802 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For katcha Peshi 01.02.2018. Mr.Raja Hans Raj Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G -=-=- Mr. Suresh Kumar files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.6 which is taken on record. Learned counsel for the petitioner under the instructions of petitioner does not press this constitutional petition which is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed
